Payment fills the oldest unpaid category: O pagamento cobre primeiro a categoria mais antiga e depois a seguinte.

Variable expense placeholder body: Shows up here when you create a recurring expense with a variable amount (no preset value — e.g. electricity bill, water bill). Each month you enter here the amount on the invoice you received.
Variable expense — enter actual amounts: Variable expense — enter actual amounts each month via Monthly Statement.
